parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO public.customers (phone, push_name)
VALUES ('{{ $json.phone }}', '{{ $json.pushName }}')
ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET push_name = EXCLUDED.push_name, updated_at = NOW()
=SELECT clinic_id FROM public.instance_clinic_map WHERE instance_name = '{{ $('Parse Evolution Payload').first().json.instanceName }}' LIMIT 1
=UPDATE public.active_chats SET is_paused = true, paused_reason = 'human_escalation' WHERE remote_jid = '{{ $('Parse Evolution Payload').first().json.remoteJid }}'

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', processed: true, agent: $('Processa Resposta Sofia').first().json.agentName }) }}

parameters.query: =DELETE FROM public.customers WHERE phone = '{{ $('É Comando Reset?').first().json.phone }}' AND clinic_id = '{{ $json.clinicId }}'
=DELETE FROM public.appointments WHERE remote_jid = '{{ $('É Comando Reset?').first().json.remoteJid }}' AND clinic_id = '{{ $('É Comando Reset?').first().json.clinicId }}'
